entities.name: SOIL MICROBIAL BIOMASS CARBON (SMBC)
entities.description: A key determinant of nutrient cycling and carbon turnover, estimated using the fumigation-extraction method.

entities.name: NUTRIENT CYCLING
entities.description: The process of nutrient movement and exchange within the soil.

entities.name: CARBON TURNOVER
entities.description: The rate at which carbon is exchanged between different soil pools.

entities.name: FUMIGATION-EXTRACTION METHOD
entities.description: A technique used to estimate SMBC by measuring the difference in organic carbon between fumigated and non-fumigated soil.

entities.name: ORGANIC CARBON
entities.description: Carbon found in organic compounds, the difference of which reflects living microbial biomass.

entities.name: LIVING MICROBIAL BIOMASS
entities.description: The total mass of living microorganisms in the soil.

entities.name: SOIL BIOLOGICAL ACTIVITY
entities.description: The collective biological processes in the soil that sustain ecosystem productivity.

entities.name: ECOSYSTEM PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The rate of biomass production in an ecosystem, sustained by soil biological activity.
